backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing a guestbook backend with user profiles, guestbook entries (add/update/delete/query), and role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and AccessControl mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two VTH logo redesign features (larger wordmark and earthy color scheme) to their affected file AppLayout.tsx and associated test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: A JSON document containing short summaries of every frontend source file, describing each component's purpose and notable implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS base file defining OKLCH-based design tokens for light and dark modes covering background, foreground, card, primary, chart, and sidebar colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the VTH Guest Book app, loading Leaflet CSS and JS via CDN and mounting the React app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with routes for the feed, add entry, entry detail, world map, and AT map pages under a shared AppLayout.
frontend/src/components/AboutDialog.tsx: Modal dialog component that explains the VTH Guest Book project and defines what a Vicarious Thru-Hiker is.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Shared layout component featuring a sticky header with a redesigned VTH emblem badge and large bold wordmark, a login/logout button, a footer with an About dialog trigger, and a bottom navigation bar.
A dialog component for editing an existing guestbook entry, managing form state for name, trail name, comment, current location, and favorite place with geocoding support.
frontend/src/components/MapLegend.tsx: A small informational card component that displays a legend hint telling users to tap a pin to view entry details.
frontend/src/components/MapPin.tsx: A styled SVG map pin button component that visually changes appearance (color and scale) when selected.
frontend/src/components/PlaceSearchField: A search input component that queries a geocoding API for place names, displays results in a dropdown, and calls a callback with the selected location.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider, managing AuthClient lifecycle, login/logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching, adding, updating, and deleting guestbook entries via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file defining Tailwind directives, a warm earthy OKLCH color palette with light/dark mode tokens, logo-specific tokens, touch-friendly sizing, and custom scrollbar styles.
frontend/src/lib/geocoding.ts: Provides a `searchPlaces` function that queries the OpenStreetMap Nominatim API and returns normalized geocoding results with display name and coordinates.
frontend/src/lib/guestbookFormat.ts: Utility functions for formatting guestbook entry data, including author labels, timestamps, coordinates, and encoding/decoding place names embedded in comment strings.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a `cn` helper that merges Tailwind CSS class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers.
frontend/src/pages/AddEntryPage.tsx: Form page for creating a new guestbook entry with optional current location (via GPS or place search) and favorite AT place, encoding place names into the comment before submission.
frontend/src/pages/ATMapPage.tsx: Renders an interactive Leaflet map showing custom pin markers for guestbook entries that have a favorite AT place, fitting the map bounds to all markers.
frontend/src/pages/EntryDetailPage.tsx: Detail view for a single guestbook entry showing full content, location badges, and edit/delete controls restricted to the entry's creator.
frontend/src/pages/GuestbookFeedPage.tsx: Displays a paginated, sorted list of guestbook entries as clickable cards with author, timestamp, comment preview, and location badges.
frontend/src/pages/WorldMapPage.tsx: Renders an interactive Leaflet world map showing guestbook entries with geographic locations as custom SVG pin markers with popups displaying author name, place, and comment preview.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with OKLCH-based design tokens for colors, custom border radii, font families, box shadows, and accordion/fade animations, plus typography and container-query plugins.
project_state.json: Tracks the VTH project's current state, existing completed features, and a pending action request to make the VTH logo bigger, more visible, and better color-coordinated with the site's warm earthy palette.
